title: rosa × polliniana var. fasciculiflora
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. fasciculiflora, also known as the Rosa polliniana fasciculiflora, is a type of fragrant rose plant with multiple clusters of small, pink flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. fasciculiflora include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
